title: Use of English - Test 3
explanation:
Use of English - B1 Test 3

Final B1 mixed review.

questions.text: The museum [*was opened|opened by|was opening] in 1890.
If you [*had listened|listened|would listen], you would have understood.
I think they [*will probably arrive|probably arrive will|arrive probably] late.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: We have lived here ____ more than ten years. | *for | since | from
The woman ____ spoke to you is our new manager. | *who | whose | where
You do not need a ticket, but you ____ reserve a seat online. | *can | mustn't | had to
My phone battery had run ____ before I got home. | *out | off | away
He said he [*would help|will help|helps] us the next day.
This route is [*less crowded|more fewer crowded|the less crowded] than the motorway.
The suitcase did not arrive, so the airline promised to [*track|book|resign] it.
I [*had been waiting|waited|was waited] for over an hour when she finally called.
